name: state_bc_efficiency_curve_v1
description: Preregistered demonstration-efficiency curve under the Phase-5 frozen hybrid fair contract. Primary curve and locked_evaluation require independent review before execution.

domain.note: All demo-pool and evaluation positions remain inside the declared nominal/readiness envelope.

demo_pool.description: Distinct successful scripted pickup demos; repeats never count as new data.
demo_pool.note: Pose XYZ match protocol-v2 train positions for envelope continuity but use efficiency-study trial IDs (8001+) and labels. Not an alias of protocol-v2 train split identity.

evaluation.note: New versioned efficiency splits. Never aliases of protocol-v2 validation or final.

matrix.formula: 5 budgets x 3 ladders x 5 seeds x 2 action spaces

primary.name: normalized_auc_success_vs_demo_count
primary.description: Normalized area under success rate versus distinct-demo-count curve, per action space.
primary.paired_contrast: joint_minus_ee_auc_difference on identical (ladder, model_seed, evaluation specs)

uncertainty.resampling_scheme: resample ladder ids and model seeds independently, then evaluate their sampled Cartesian product
notes: Model seeds and subset ladders are distinct variance factors.
Cells sharing a ladder or model seed are correlated and are not treated as 15 independent replicates.
Five model seeds alone do not measure demonstration-selection variance.
Never extrapolate a demo threshold beyond observed budgets.
If a target performance level is not crossed, report not_reached.
